dharma_rakshak.tagline: Sanskriti hi Shakti hai — Culture is Power

policies.title: Gau-Krishi Samriddhi Yojana
policies.description: Establish cow-based organic farming cooperatives in every village. Provide free desi cow breeds, gobar-gas plants, and organic certification. Ban chemical fertilizers within 5 years.
policies.promise_to_voters: Every farmer will earn ₹50,000/year extra from organic premium + cow by-products.

policies.title: Vedic Vidya Digital Pathshala
policies.description: Replace Western-style education with a 'Gurukul 2.0' model. Digitize ancient Indian texts and make them mandatory curriculum. Create AI tutors that teach in Sanskrit.
policies.promise_to_voters: Our children will learn both coding and the Vedas. No more cultural confusion.

policies.title: Swadeshi Bazaar Protection Act
policies.description: Impose 200% import tax on foreign consumer goods. Create 'Swadeshi Certification' for local products with tax benefits. Ban FDI in retail and agriculture.
policies.promise_to_voters: Every rupee you spend will stay in Bharat. No more Amazon destroying our shops.

policies.title: Ganga-Yamuna Jal Seva
policies.description: Massive river rejuvenation project combining temple restoration with water conservation. Every village within 50km of a river gets free irrigation from traditional check-dams.
policies.promise_to_voters: Clean rivers, full wells, and prosperous temples. Our ancestors' water wisdom will save us.

policies.title: Panchayat Purnarjivan — Reviving Village Republics
policies.description: Transfer 50% of district budget directly to Gram Sabhas. Restore the ancient Panchayat system where the village council has judicial, executive, and financial powers.
policies.promise_to_voters: The village will be its own king. No more begging Delhi for permission.

policies.title: Smart Gram 2.0 — One App, All Services
policies.description: Deploy a single super-app for all government services: ration card, land records, health booking, complaint filing. Every panchayat gets free Wi-Fi and a digital kiosk.
policies.promise_to_voters: Never stand in a queue again. Everything on your phone in 30 seconds.

policies.title: District Startup Launchpad
policies.description: Zero-tax SEZ for startups in every district HQ. ₹10 lakh seed grant for any registered startup. Partnership with IITs for mentorship.
policies.promise_to_voters: Don't migrate to Bengaluru — build the next unicorn from your own district.

policies.title: Precision Agriculture Data Grid
policies.description: Satellite-monitored crop health + drone-based pesticide spraying + AI-predicted market prices sent via SMS. Farmers get real-time advisory in their language.
policies.promise_to_voters: Your phone will tell you exactly when to sow, when to spray, and where to sell for the best price.

policies.title: Blockchain Panchayat Ledger
policies.description: Every rupee of panchayat budget tracked on a public blockchain. Real-time dashboard showing fund allocation, contractor payments, and project progress.
policies.promise_to_voters: Zero corruption. Every citizen can audit every paisa spent from their phone.

policies.title: HealthStack — AI Telemedicine for Every Village
policies.description: AI-powered telemedicine kiosks in every sub-center. Patients consult specialist doctors via video, get digital prescriptions, and receive medicines via drone delivery.
policies.promise_to_voters: An AIIMS-level doctor consultation for every villager, free of cost.

jan_neta.tagline: Zameen, Roti, Izzat — Land, Bread, Dignity

policies.title: MNREGA Plus — 200 Days of Guaranteed Work
policies.description: Expand MNREGA from 100 to 200 days. Raise daily wage to match state minimum wage. Priority for women, Dalits, and tribal workers. Include skilled work categories.
policies.promise_to_voters: No family will go hungry. 200 days of dignified work is your RIGHT, not charity.

policies.title: Bhumi Adhikar — Land to the Tiller
policies.description: Redistribute all land above 10 acres to landless laborers. Cancel all land lease agreements with corporates. Community ownership of common lands (grazing, forests).
policies.promise_to_voters: If you plow the land, you own the land. No more working on someone else's field.

policies.title: Corporate Tax Doubling + Worker Profit Share
policies.description: Double corporate tax for companies operating in the district. Mandate 20% profit sharing with workers. Create worker cooperatives for all government-contracted projects.
policies.promise_to_voters: The rich have looted enough. Now workers will get their fair share.

policies.title: Janta Darbar — Weekly Open Courts
policies.description: Mandatory weekly public hearings where officials must answer citizen complaints. Citizen juries can impose fines on corrupt officials. Community veto power on all projects above ₹1 crore.
policies.promise_to_voters: Every babu will answer to you, face to face, every week. No more hiding behind files.

policies.title: Community Radio + Free Data for All
policies.description: Establish community-owned radio stations in every block. Provide 5GB free mobile data per family per month. Ban corporate media from local spectrum.
policies.promise_to_voters: Your voice will be heard. Free internet and your own radio station run by the village.

mukti_devi.tagline: Prosperity Through Freedom, Growth Through Competition

policies.title: Panchayat Free Trade Zone
policies.description: Declare the entire panchayat area a free trade zone. Zero business registration fees, flat 10% tax, and single-window clearance for all investments above ₹1 lakh.
policies.promise_to_voters: Start a business in 24 hours with zero paperwork. Let your entrepreneurial spirit fly.

policies.title: AgriMarket Liberalization — Let Farmers Sell Anywhere
policies.description: Abolish APMC mandi monopoly. Allow farmers to sell directly to any buyer, including international markets. Create an online commodity exchange for crops.
policies.promise_to_voters: You grew it, you decide where to sell it. No middleman will eat your profit.

policies.title: Direct Benefit Transfer — Cash, Not Schemes
policies.description: Replace ALL subsidies (food, fertilizer, fuel, LPG) with a single monthly cash transfer of ₹3,000 per family. Let families decide how to spend it.
policies.promise_to_voters: No more ration shop corruption. Cash in your account every month. Your money, your choice.

policies.title: PPP Tech Parks — India's Next Hyderabad
policies.description: Public-Private Partnership to build tech parks on unused government land. 50% land + utilities provided by govt, 50% investment by private companies. Tax holiday for 10 years.
policies.promise_to_voters: IT jobs won't stay in Hyderabad and Pune. We'll bring them to YOUR district.

policies.title: Privatize to Prioritize — Efficient Services Act
policies.description: Outsource non-core government services (sanitation, water supply, road maintenance) to private companies via competitive bidding. Performance-linked contracts with citizen ratings.
policies.promise_to_voters: Private efficiency, public accountability. Your roads will actually get repaired.

meta.description: Each candidate has 5 policy planks covering the 5 categories. ideology_impact shows how choosing this policy shifts the game state on the 8-axis model.
